title: Integration API is not starting

posts.author: Dominic1 (Dominic Hains)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have an integration app that I use for some data treatment.
Everything was working well but now the mondayTunnel from @mondaydotcomorg/tunnel won’t work anymore.
I tried creating a new feature using the quickstart-integrations model offered by monday.com but it is still not working.

Here is the command lines :

image941×776 22.7 KB

Do you have any idea what im doing wrong ?

Thank you !

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The mondayTunnel service has been spotty for a while (and expired certificates happened too).

ngrok is a recommended alternative to mondayTunnel.
